span.p:
build_choice_score_result
app/services/scoring/utils.py
목적: choice_score 규칙으로 척도별 총점을 계산

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
함수 내부 순서
1. test_id 정규화
2. context.answers_by_test_variant 조회
3. context.scoring_index_by_test_variant 조회
4. sub_test_json 반복
5. scale 반복
6. items 또는 facets 분기
7. choice_score[item_id][answer_value] 점수 계산
8. scale 결과 누적
9. ScoringResult 반환

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
answers_by_test_variant 조회
app/services/scoring/utils.py
목적: 이미 정규화된 응답 row 사용
입력: context.answers_by_test_variant['STS']
출력: {'{...}': {'3':'4','22':'4'}}

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
scoring_index_by_test_variant 조회
app/services/scoring/utils.py
목적: 이미 정규화된 scale 인덱스 사용
입력: context.scoring_index_by_test_variant['STS']
출력: {'{...}': {'selected_scale_codes':['CA'],'scales':{...}}}

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
build_choice_score_result
app/services/scoring/utils.py
해당 test_id 답변이 존재하는가?

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;
display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
variant loop 시작
sub_test_json별 answers_by_item 처리

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
variant_index 조회
app/services/scoring/utils.py
목적: sub_test_json별 미리 생성된 scoring index 조회
입력: context.scoring_index_by_test_variant[test_id][sub_test_json]
출력: { selected_scale_codes, scales }

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;
display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;
display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;
display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
choice_score loop
item_id별 문항 점수 계산
예시:
- item_id='3', answer_value='4' -> score_map['4']='4'
- item_id='22', answer_value='4' -> score_map['4']='2'

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
facet loop
app/services/scoring/utils.py
예시:
- raw_scale['facets']['T1']['items']
- raw_scale['facets']['T2']['items']
facet별 점수 계산 후 top-level scale 합산

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
_parse_numeric_score
app/services/scoring/utils.py
목적: 문자열 점수를 int/float로 변환
입력: '4' / '2'
출력: 4 / 2

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
_score_choice_score_map
app/services/scoring/utils.py
목적: facet의 items 맵을 이용해 facet subtotal 계산
입력: answers_by_item + facet items
출력: { total_score, answered_item_count, expected_item_count, item_scores }

StsScorer.score / GoldenScorer.score
